sections.title: Form Completion Guide (Supplemental)
sections.summary: Additional guidance for completing MCPD forms correctly. This section supplements, but does not replace, the original handbook.

topics.title: How To Use Form Guides
topics.content: Use this section for quick reminders on field completion standards. Always confirm final requirements against the original handbook and applicable policy.

sections.title: Scenario-Based Paperwork Guide (Supplemental)
sections.summary: Quick-reference paperwork expectations by common incident type. Validate with current policy and command guidance.

sections.title: Example Completed Forms (Supplemental)
sections.summary: Training examples and formatting references. Use fictional data only.
